svg.title: TRACE full architecture and flow
svg.desc: Four layers: actors, the governed execution loop (PR as state machine), the telemetry/observability data plane, the git/evidence plane, and the deferred auto-research extension, plus a legend of gate types.
svg.text: Template · Route · Assign · Check · Evidence — a governed loop (control) over a telemetry plane (observe) and a git plane (truth)
read AGENTS.md first · stay in role + scope
advisory in v1 · enforced in v2
git is the source of truth —
the Pull Request IS the state machine (trace/ORBITAL_PATHS.yaml)
non-blocking · JSONL is the write-ahead truth · SQLite is a queryable projection
deterministic · version-controlled · what actually shipped (never estimated)
DEFERRED · DRAFT v1 — spec only, no orchestrator yet
Use ONLY if: objective metric · fast feedback · fixed per-experiment budget · failures cheap/sandboxed · hard-to-game scorer
(else reward-hacking) — never for UI aesthetics, strategy, slow/subjective goals
winner enters as a normal PR ↑
